sql_array: CREATE TABLE millennia_test (id INTEGER, interval_data INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO millennia_test (id, interval_data) VALUES (1, to_millennia(2));
INSERT INTO millennia_test (id, interval_data) VALUES (2, to_millennia(3));
UPDATE millennia_test SET interval_data = to_millennia(4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, interval_data FROM millennia_test WHERE interval_data > to_millennia(1);
